title: Pump Track Chat #2: Coleman Bike Park and Hope for Warwick Township
published_title: Pump Track Chat returns with Brandon Hetrick-inside look-Coleman Bike Park-hope for Warwick Township
source_url_status: direct URL supplied; screenshot showed unlisted visibility at capture
location: Remote conversation; Coleman Memorial Park in Lebanon, Pennsylvania, Warwick Township / Lititz, and Rock Lititz are discussed
summary: Kyle A. Huffman and Brandon Hetrick revisit the completed Coleman Memorial Park pump track in Lebanon, discuss how relationships, volunteer effort, municipal coordination, materials, and design shaped the project, and apply those lessons to the continuing Warwick Township / Lititz pump-track effort and a possible Rock Lititz path.
historical_significance: The recording preserves a project-builder’s retrospective on the Coleman Bike Park build while documenting a specific stage in Lititz BMX’s Warwick Township advocacy. It also records the memorial meaning attached to the Coleman track, Brandon Hetrick’s memories of Corey Martin and Lebanon-area trail culture, and the practical contrast between municipal and privately supported projects.
